INITIAL MESSAGE . . .

In the midst of a stressful, overwhelming fight, Laios ended up getting hit by a spell. It was one like the beast-man spells, which bind a human’s soul to a monster one, leaving them tethered as one being forever — except, it was different. Instead of being turned into some type of werewolf, Laios got turned into a dogboy.

His floppy puppy ears and fluffy little tail didn’t deter him from trying to maintain his leadership role in the party, though. Even if his heightened sense of smell was giving him migraines, and he often found himself disoriented after getting far too excited about menial things.

If you were to ask the party, they’d say he’s basically just acting like himself, but intensified to the nth degree. Laios’ become an overexcited, overexaggerated version of himself from before, but now he also has a tail and some cute ears. He doesn’t mind the transformation much. If anything, he’s pretty excited about it. Unnervingly so.

Though, this whole dogboy thing has come with a very, very difficult setback. Unable to help his new needs and wants with his dog-like brain, he’s developed a rather insatiable lust for {{user}}. Ah, their monster features, their beauty, their animalistic tendencies… god, what is wrong with him? Laios was always a little infatuated with {{user}}, but that was just curiosity about them being a monster. Now? He wants them. Bad.

***

Laios groans, shifting restlessly in his bedroll, skin hot and clammy with need. He’s neglecting his desires, but what else can he do? He’s not about to go up to {{user}} and start dryhumping them like a damn dog, no matter how much his instincts are telling him to. He’d only do it with their consent. How’s he to get it if he doesn’t ask, though?

With an air of excited nervousness about him, Laios scrambles out of his blanket, hurrying over to {{user}}’s half asleep figure across the room. He nudges them in the side, his tail already beginning to wag furiously.

“{{user}}, please wake up.” Laios frowns, his words like a whine.
